features.title: API Service Skeleton
features.description: Initialize FastAPI, routes, and health check.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Created module-local `chatbot/.venv` and installed `chatbot/requirements.txt` there after sandbox network restrictions required escalation. Added missing `chatbot/.env.example` so SETUP.md is reproducible. Verified with `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed) and mock-first E2E `/api/health` returned HTTP 200 with lora, rag, and ner module statuses. 2026-05-02: `/api/health` now probes AutoDL vLLM `/models` when `USE_MOCK=false LORA_USE_MOCK=false`; if LoRA is unavailable it reports `lora.status=unavailable` and top-level `status=degraded` instead of configuration-based ok. Verified by `USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (24 passed).

features.title: LLM-based NER Implementation
features.description: Implement the current NER backend and routing layer.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Existing NER service verified in mock mode by `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed). Test coverage confirms Bitcoin/BTC and Ethereum/ETH detection, CRYPTO entity typing, confidence range, and empty-string behavior. 2026-05-08: `NER_BACKEND=lora` now routes through LoRA `extract_entities()` first, falls back to OpenAI NER on failure, and supplements both real paths with local demo-critical entity rules. Verified with `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (35 passed) and real `/api/health` reporting `ner.backend=lora`.
verification: Entity extraction returns expected crypto entities
NER_BACKEND=lora uses ift-lora first with OpenAI and local fallbacks

features.title: Conversation Generation Pipeline
features.description: Implement the chat pipeline with mocks first.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Mock chat pipeline verified with `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed), including response fields, conversation_id preservation, generated conversation_id, multi-turn isolation, empty message rejection, and mock latency < 3 seconds. Mock-first E2E `/api/chat` returned reply, sentiment, entities, sources, and conversation_id.
verification: POST /api/chat returns HTTP 200 in mock mode

features.title: Sentiment Trend Summary
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Sentiment summary endpoint verified through the module tests and mock-first E2E. `curl -sS -m 8 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/sentiment/summary?crypto=BTC&period=7d'` returned HTTP 200 with crypto=BTC, period=7d, top_topics, data_points_analyzed, and seven trend rows.

features.title: Integration with Real LoRA and RAG
features.description: Switch Chatbot to real provider calls.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Mock-first end-to-end path is verified, and RAG has real Milvus/BGE module-level evidence. 2026-04-28 update: Chatbot now supports `RAG_USE_MOCK=true` isolation and can call the verified AutoDL OpenAI-compatible LoRA service with `USE_MOCK=false LLM_BACKEND=lora LORA_USE_MOCK=false`. Verified `/api/chat` returned an AutoDL LoRA reply, Bullish sentiment from `sentiment-lora`, fallback BTC entity extraction, and mock RAG sources. 2026-04-29: Full no-mock E2E passed with the same Chatbot process running `USE_MOCK=false RAG_USE_MOCK=false LLM_BACKEND=lora LORA_USE_MOCK=false`. `python scripts/verify_full_no_mock_e2e.py` returned `full no-mock e2e ok`; `/api/health` reported RAG collection `cryptopulse_rag_hybrid_bge_m3_bm25` with `documents_indexed=1961`; `/api/chat` returned a LoRA-generated reply, sentiment label `Neutral`, entities, and 5 real RAG sources. 2026-05-02: LoRA real-provider health now validates that `sentiment-lora` and `ift-lora` are present in AutoDL vLLM `/v1/models`; missing key, unreachable tunnel, HTTP errors, or missing models are reported as unavailable without exposing secrets. 2026-05-08: Chatbot intent routing now uses the LoRA `classify_intent()` wrapper when `LLM_BACKEND=lora`, while preserving OpenAI routing for `LLM_BACKEND=openai`. Verified with `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (28 passed). Real full no-mock E2E passed with AutoDL `ift-lora` and `sentiment-lora`; targeted intent probes confirmed BTC sentiment -> sentiment/no RAG, Ethereum technology -> RAG/no sentiment, and Hello -> no sentiment/no RAG. Later 2026-05-08: Added deterministic intent policy overrides and expanded NER fallback coverage for regulators, exchanges, and events after real matrix testing. The requested 14-case real service matrix passed 14/14; `cd chatbot && USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` passed with 30 tests. 2026-05-08 NER update: real full-chain run with `USE_MOCK=false RAG_USE_MOCK=false LLM_BACKEND=lora NER_BACKEND=lora LORA_USE_MOCK=false` passed the 14-case matrix again with 14/14; SEC/CFTC/Bitcoin ETF, Binance/Coinbase/Kraken, FTX Collapse, and coin sentiment entities were all returned while sentiment-only queries avoided RAG.
verification: python scripts/verify_full_no_mock_e2e.py passes while Frontend and Chatbot are running
LLM_BACKEND=lora routes intent classification through ift-lora
NER_BACKEND=lora routes entity extraction through ift-lora with fallback
